title: payload: deal.amend
description: Re-define an existing deal in place. `deal` is the full new definition (its `revision` must be `base_revision` + 1, same `deal_id`). BF gates the change against the allowed-edit matrix (amend_rules) using the deal's live execution phase, then lets reconcile bring broker orders to the new desired state. Unlike deal.publish, the deal's status and observed execution state (orders/positions/phase) are preserved.
